name: NKK Switches Co., Ltd.
summary: NKK Switches Co., Ltd. engages in the development, manufacture, and sale of various switches for industrial equipment worldwide. The company offers toggle, locker, pushbutton, illuminated pushbutton, multi-function pushbutton, emergency stop, key lock, rotary, slide, tactile, and tilt switches; indicator light; relay; seat keyboard; touch panel; and accessories, as well as universal design products. Its products are used in information and communication equipment, space satellite equipment, computers, FA automation equipment, aviation, railways, ships, medical care, disaster prevention, measurement and control equipment, semiconductor-related equipment, amusement, mobile communication, health environment, etc. The company was formerly known as Nihon Kaiheiki Ind. Co., Ltd. and changed its name to NKK Switches Co., Ltd. in April 2014. NKK Switches Co., Ltd. was founded in 1951 and is headquartered in Kawasaki, Japan.
